intel.tagline: San Diego's premier LGBTQ-owned restaurant and only urban oasis
intel.description: insideOUT is an elevated restaurant and lounge located in Hillcrest, San Diego, featuring California-Mediterranean inspired cuisine curated by Executive Chef Johnny Duran. The venue combines a sophisticated main dining room with handcrafted tables and an open-air atrium with walkways and water features. Known for outstanding customer service, over-the-top seasonal experiences, and creating a safe, welcoming space for all guests.
intel.social_proof: LGBTQ-owned restaurant, multiple positive Yelp reviews praising service and food quality, described as having one of the most unique dining experiences in San Diego
intel.key_cta: Book a table through OpenTable or call for reservations
intel.missing: Business hours not displayed, no online menu preview on homepage, no staff/team photos, no current event calendar details, no pricing information, no private events inquiry form
intel.brand_vibe: Modern urban luxury, welcoming LGBTQ-friendly, upscale yet approachable
intel.pain_point: No clear online booking integration on the homepage makes reservation process less frictionless than competitors.
intel.chat_persona: Be warm, enthusiastic, and inclusive while providing expert recommendations about menu items, events, and the unique atmosphere that makes insideOUT special.
intel.cta_angle: Reserve a Table for an Unforgettable Dining Experience or Inquire About Private Events

email.subject_b: Guests can't find your hours or menu before visiting
email.subject_c: More private event bookings for insideOUT
email.body:
The open-air atrium with water features and Chef Johnny Duran's California-Mediterranean menu make insideOUT one of the most unique dining spots in Hillcrest — but your website is missing key details like hours, menu preview, and a way to book private events.

We built you a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that answers guest questions about reservations, dietary accommodations, and private event inquiries 24/7.

See it here: https://joshclifford.github.io/lvrg-previews/insideoutsd/index.html

Claim it free by booking a 15-min call: https://theresandiego.com/advertise/

Josh | LVRG Agency | lvrg.com | 619.361.7484
